items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding 'Anonymous vs attributed options' as part of the feedback collection process. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of these options. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
